name: workplace-memo
description: Sovereign local-first document editor — PointSav Digital Systems
author: PointSav Digital Systems

_notes.platform: Tauri v1.6.x is used for macOS 10.13 High Sierra compatibility. Tauri v2 requires macOS 10.15+. When the development machine is upgraded, bump @tauri-apps/cli and @tauri-apps/api to 2.x and update src-tauri/Cargo.toml accordingly. The frontend code is identical between v1 and v2.
_notes.linux-build: On Linux (production sovereign target), Tauri v2 is preferred. To build with v2 on Linux: npm install @tauri-apps/cli@2 @tauri-apps/api@2 and update src-tauri/Cargo.toml tauri dependency to 2.x
